buildCommand: pnpm --filter @chatv2/shared build && pnpm --filter @chatv2/web exec vite build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; media-src 'self' blob: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https: wss:; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; form-action 'self'; manifest-src 'self'; worker-src 'self' blob:
